name: souroldgeezer-design
description: Reference-driven design for modern web UIs and serverless HTTP APIs — build, review, and look up responsive interfaces (WCAG 2.2 AA, i18n, Core Web Vitals) and serverless APIs (security, contract discipline, reliability, observability) across Azure Functions .NET, Cosmos DB, and Blob Storage, with composable per-stack extensions and matching subagents.
